data.content: Implementation review: APPROVED. Verified: (1) sync_or_defer_with_progress correctly returns Deferred instead of erroring on active leases, (2) trigger_queued_sync is best-effort and never fails lease termination, (3) sync_pending lifecycle is sound (set on defer, cleared by sync/apply.rs on successful sync), (4) push/pull remain blocked by active leases (unchanged), (5) JSON output is backward-compatible for Completed and clean for Deferred, (6) 4 unit tests cover key paths (noop/skip/best-effort/multi-lease), (7) make sanity passes: 694 tests, 0 failures, 95.22% coverage (threshold 95%).
